calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-07-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas Wrobel for executor Shan Xiao (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Final Distribution on Waiver of Accounting and Request for Statutory and Extraordinary Fees.

Mr. Wrobel stated that he intends to submit on the papers, but explained that the case had been initially handled by another attorney who suffered an accident and was medically retired. As a result, additional work was required by the petitioner and his office to complete the probate. Mr. Wrobel acknowledged that the examiner's concern related to the administrator's receipt of $10,000 in compensation and the additional requests for statutory and extraordinary fees, but stated that the work performed justified the fees sought.

Following discussion, the Court took the matter under submission.

Judge: Cindee Mayfield; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-29-2025 Continued To Oct-07-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Thomas Wrobel, Esq., for Shan Xiao, Executor.

At the court's query regarding the extensive issues with this Estate as noted by the Examiner, counsel reports regarding the delays in closing the Estate.

After additional discussion, the subject matter is continued to Oct-07-2025 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204. Counsel is instructed to file responses to the Examiner's notes by Sep-23-2025 and to have said responses verified by his client.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Peou. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jun-17-2025 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Continued To Jun-17-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-29-2025 Continued To May-28-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY, Appointment Under IAEA
Off Calendar Apr-16-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Thomas Wrobel, Esq., for Shan Xiao, Petitioner.

At the court's query, Mr. Wrobel advises of having filed a supplemental declaration which he feels addresses most, if not all, the concerns raised within the Examiner's notes. The court recognizes the preceding and upon additional consideration, any remaining defects are waived in open court. The court confirms with counsel that there are no known objections and confirms the same in open court. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jan-05-2012, the first codicil dated Jan-31-2014, and the second codicil dated Sep-21-2017 are admitted to probate. Shan Xiao is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate Referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Apr-29-2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Jaime. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-08-2023 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

Petition for probate of will and letters testamentary is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Stephen Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Cabrera. Not reported.
